---
title: "01_download"
author: "Vinci Chan"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc_expand: true
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

# 1. Load Package

```{r}
library(data.table)
library(lubridate)
library(dplyr)
library(DBI)
library(RSQLite)
library(future)
library(furrr)

source("R/config.R")
source("R/utils_dates.R")
source("R/utils_db.R")
```

# 2. Setup

```{r}
dates <- make_quarter_tbl(
  start_year = cfg$start_year,
  end_year = cfg$end_year
)

plan(multisession, workers = 3) # throttling for SEC request limit
```

# 3. Functions

## 3.1. SEC master file

```{r}
qtr.master.file <- function(date){
  # create URL of master index for that quarter
  master.link <- paste0(
    "https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/full-index/", 
    year(date), "/QTR", quarter(date), "/master.idx"
  )

  print(sprintf(
    "Downloading master file for quarter %d of year %s...", 
    quarter(date), year(date)
  ))

  # download master index into tmp.txt
  tmp_path <- file.path(cfg$data_dir, "tmp.txt")

  ok <- FALSE
  for (attempt in 1:3) {
    cat(sprintf(" Master attempt %d...\n", attempt))
    res <- try(
      download.file(
        master.link,
        tmp_path,
        headers = c("User-Agent" = cfg$sec_user_agent),
        mode = "wb",
        quiet = TRUE
      ),
      silent = TRUE
    )

    if (!inherits(res, "try-error")) {
      ok <- TRUE
      break
    }

    cat("  Master download failed, waiting 30s before retry\n")
    Sys.sleep(30)
  }

  if (!ok) {
    stop("Failed to download master.idx for ", year(date), " Q", quarter(date))
  }

  # create master file for all 13F filings that quarter with links 
  master <- tmp_path %>% 
    readLines() %>% 
    paste0(collapse = "\n") %>%
    fread(sep = "|", skip = 11) %>%
    `colnames<-`(c("cik", "name", "type", "date", "link")) %>% 
    filter(grepl("^13F-HR(/A)?$", type)) %>%
    mutate(link = paste0("https://www.sec.gov/Archives/", link)) %>% 
    mutate(file = gsub(".*/", "", link))

  closeAllConnections()
  file.remove(tmp_path)
  return(master)
}
```

## 3.2. Download files into tmp dir

```{r}
dwnld.files <- function(master) {
  dir.create(cfg$staging_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
  master <- master %>% distinct(file, .keep_all = TRUE)

  n_files <- nrow(master)

  download_one <- function(idx) {
    file_path <- file.path(cfg$staging_dir, master$file[idx])
    success <- FALSE

    for (attempt in 1:3) {
      tryCatch(
        {
          download.file(
            master$link[idx],
            file_path,
            quiet   = TRUE,
            headers = c("User-Agent" = cfg$sec_user_agent),
            mode    = "wb"
          )
          success <- TRUE
          break
        },
        error = function(e) {
          wait <- 5 * attempt   # 5s, 10s, 15s
          cat(sprintf(
            "\nFile %d/%d attempt %d failed, waiting %ds\n",
            idx, n_files, attempt, wait
          ))
          Sys.sleep(wait)
        }
      )
    }

    # gentle per-file delay to avoid burstiness
    Sys.sleep(0.3)

    if (!success) {
      cat(sprintf(
        "\n*** Gave up on filing %d/%d: %s ***\n",
        idx, n_files, master$file[idx]
      ))
    }

    invisible(NULL)
  }

  cat("Starting parallel file downloads...\n")
  future_walk(seq_len(n_files), download_one, .progress = TRUE)
  cat("\nQuarter filings downloaded (a few may still be skipped)\n")
}
```

## 3.3 Put all forms in SQdatabase

```{r}
put.files.in.sql <- function(dbname) {
  together <- function(x) {
    paste(x, collapse = "\n")
  }

  con <- dbConnect(SQLite(), dbname = dbname)
  on.exit(dbDisconnect(con), add = TRUE)

  if (dbExistsTable(con, "compsubm")) {
    dbRemoveTable(con, "compsubm")
  }
  dbExecute(con, "CREATE TABLE compsubm (FILENAME TEXT, COMLSUBFILE TEXT)")

  files <- list.files(cfg$staging_dir)
  n <- length(files)
  step <- 500

  for (i in 1:(n %/% step + 1)) {
    start <- 1 + (i - 1) * step
    end <- i * step
    ind <- start:min(end, n)

    objects <- lapply(file.path(cfg$staging_dir, files[ind]), readLines)
    clean <- lapply(objects, together)

    data <- NULL
    data$FILENAME <- files[ind]
    data <- as.data.frame(data)
    data$COMLSUBFILE <- unlist(clean)

    dbWriteTable(con, "compsubm", data, append = TRUE)
  }

  unlink(cfg$staging_dir, recursive = TRUE)
}
```

# 4. Run functions

```{r}
for (i in 1:nrow(dates)) {
  cat(sprintf("\n=== Quarter %d/%d: %s ===\n", i, nrow(dates), dates$year_qtr[i]))

  start_time <- Sys.time()
  message(start_time)

  master <- qtr.master.file(dates$date[i])

  fwrite(
    master,
    file.path(cfg$master_index_dir, paste0("master_", dates$year_qtr[i], ".csv")),
    row.names = FALSE
  )

  cat("Downloading", nrow(master), "files...\n")
  dwnld.files(master)

  cat("Loading to SQL...\n")
  put.files.in.sql(sqlite_path(dates$year_qtr[i]))

  end_time <- Sys.time()
  elapsed <- end_time - start_time

  message(
    sprintf("Total time for %s: %.1f minutes (%.1f seconds)",
            yq, as.numeric(elapsed, units = "mins"),
            as.numeric(elapsed, units = "secs"))
}
```
